---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

I welcome inquiries from prospective students, collaborators, and colleagues.

## Get in Touch

**Email:** [frederick.boehm@sdstate.edu](mailto:frederick.boehm@sdstate.edu)

**Office:** Room 254, Chicoine Architecture, Mathematics, and Engineering Building
South Dakota State University
Brookings, South Dakota 57007

**Office Hours:** By appointment — email to schedule.

---

## Find Me Online

- [GitHub](https://github.com/fboehm)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/fred-boehm-27992a37a/)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=k7PBnv4AAAAJ&hl=en)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1644-5931)
